data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the accommodations management feature, specifically for extra time and breaks during the exam. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete details or endpoints that confirm the implementation of this requirement. The linked use case mentions accommodations management but lacks specific evidence to demonstrate that this feature is operational, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of accommodations management for extra time and breaks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for accommodations management
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the accommodations management feature.
